info.name: Same Day Solution ÔÇö Payout Partner API
info.description:
Bank Payout (IMPS/NEFT) Partner API ÔÇö powered by SparkUpTech Express Pay.

## Authentication
Every authenticated request requires 3 headers:
- `x-api-key` ÔÇö Your public API key
- `x-signature` ÔÇö HMAC-SHA256 signature
- `x-timestamp` ÔÇö Current Unix timestamp (ms)

Signature formula:
```
HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, JSON.stringify(body) + timestamp)
```
For GET requests (no body): `HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, '' + timestamp)`

## Setup
1. Set `api_key` and `api_secret` in Collection Variables
2. Pre-request scripts auto-generate signature
3. All requests are ready to fire

## Security
- IP Whitelisting enforced (contact admin to whitelist your server IP)
- Timestamp tolerance: 5 minutes
- HTTPS required in production
- Permission required: `payout` or `all`

## Capabilities
- Get bank list (IMPS/NEFT)
- Verify bank account (beneficiary name ÔÇö penniless)
- Initiate transfer (IMPS/NEFT)
- Check transfer status or list recent transfers

## Financial Operations
Transfer requires `retailer_id` ÔÇö the retailer's partner_id whose wallet will be debited.
Duplicate prevention: same account within 2 minutes returns 429.

item.name: ­čöÉ Payout ÔÇö Authenticated
item.description:
All requests require `x-api-key`, `x-signature`, and `x-timestamp` headers.

The pre-request script automatically calculates the HMAC signature.

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');
pm.test('Has banks', function() { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.true; pm.expect(j.banks).to.be.an('array'); });

query.description: Search by bank name or IFSC

request.description:
Returns list of banks for payout. Use `bankId` and `bankName` in Verify and Transfer.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `imps` | Boolean | IMPS-enabled banks only |
| `neft` | Boolean | NEFT-enabled banks only |
| `popular` | Boolean | Popular banks only |
| `search` | String | Search by bank name |

response.name: 200 ÔÇö Banks
401 ÔÇö Unauthorized (IP Blocked)

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');

request.description:
Verify bank account and get beneficiary name. Penniless transaction (no charges).

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `accountNumber` | String | Ôťů Yes | Bank account number |
| `ifscCode` | String | Ôťů Yes | IFSC code |
| `bankName` | String | No | Bank name |
| `bankId` | Number | No | Bank ID from bank list |

response.name: 200 ÔÇö Verified
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "is_valid": true,
  "account_holder_name": "John Doe",
  "bank_name": "HDFC Bank",
  "branch_name": "Mumbai Main",
  "verification_charges": 0,
  "message": "Account verified successfully"
}

if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');

request.description:
Initiate IMPS or NEFT transfer. Debits retailer's wallet (amount + charges).

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `retailer_id` | String | Ôťů Yes | Retailer partner_id (wallet debited) |
| `accountNumber` | String | Ôťů Yes | Beneficiary account number |
| `ifscCode` | String | Ôťů Yes | IFSC code |
| `accountHolderName` | String | Ôťů Yes | Beneficiary name |
| `amount` | Number | Ôťů Yes | Amount in rupees |
| `transferMode` | String | Ôťů Yes | `IMPS` or `NEFT` |
| `bankId` | Number | Ôťů Yes | Bank ID from bank list |
| `bankName` | String | Ôťů Yes | Bank name |
| `beneficiaryMobile` | String | Ôťů Yes | 10-digit mobile (6-9 start) |
| `senderName` | String | Ôťů Yes | Sender name |
| `senderMobile` | String | Ôťů Yes | 10-digit mobile (6-9 start) |
| `senderEmail` | String | No | Sender email |
| `remarks` | String | No | Transfer remarks |

### Duplicate Prevention
Same account within 2 minutes returns 429. Wait before retrying.

### On Failure
Wallet is automatically refunded.

response.name: 429 ÔÇö Duplicate Prevention

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');

request.description:
Check status of a single payout transfer.

For pending/processing transactions, the API auto-checks with the provider and updates status.
Failed transactions are auto-refunded.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `transactionId` | String | Conditional | Our internal transaction UUID |
| `clientRefId` | String | Conditional | Client ref ID from transfer |

At least one of `transactionId` or `clientRefId` is required.

request.description:
Get list of recent payout transactions for a retailer (last 20).

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `list` | Boolean | Ôťů Yes | Must be `true` |
| `retailer_id` | String | Ôťů Yes | Retailer partner_id |
